response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native industrial platform design — core requirements for this role. Their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, outdated C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, insufficient to meet senior-level C++ architectural demands.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Proven track record in open-source leadership and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to work across embedded, real-time, and cloud environments
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL development in the last 9 years
Lacks documented experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or MQTT/Modbus protocols
No evidence of designing scalable on-premises industrial automation platforms
